chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 677 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 15039 2. For Katcha Peshi. 3. For orders on M.A 15655/16 04.11.2016. Mr. Muhammad Azeem Shaikh, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Hayat Mughal, Advocate for petitioner. -.-.-. 1. Granted, as the learned Counsel contends that an ex parte judgment has been passed against the petitioner and respondents’ side is seriously pursuing the execution proceedings. 2&3. According to petitioner, he is resident of Karachi and was never served with the notices and summons of Family Suit No. 307/2014 in which the impugned judgment and decree has been assed. Adjourned to 23.11.2016 at 01:00 p.m. Till next date, the execution proceedings filed by respondent No.1 is stayed, however, with a note of caution that if on next date of hearing the petitioner’s side avoided to proceed with the matter, the restraining order granted today shall stand vacated. JUDGE Ali Haider
